allow: PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\workspace\\chanho\\ClaudeSubAgent\\README.md"\); Write-Output "First 20 bytes: $\($bytes[0..19] -join ','\)"; Write-Output "Has UTF8 BOM: $\($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\)"; Write-Output "Length: $\($bytes.Length\)")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\workspace\\chanho\\ClaudeSubAgent\\README.md"\); $line3start = 0; $newlines = 0; for\($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if\($bytes[$i] -eq 10\) { $newlines++; if\($newlines -eq 2\) { $line3start = $i+1; break } } }; Write-Output "Line 3 starts at byte: $line3start"; Write-Output "Bytes 30-60: $\($bytes[30..60] -join ','\)")

PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\workspace\\chanho\\ClaudeSubAgent\\README.md", [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\(949\)\); $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\("C:\\workspace\\chanho\\ClaudeSubAgent\\README.md", $content, $utf8NoBom\); Write-Output "Saved as UTF-8 \(no BOM\)")

PowerShell($path = "C:\\workspace\\chanho\\ClaudeSubAgent\\projects\\starter-project\\README.md"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); Write-Output "Length: $\($bytes.Length\)"; Write-Output "Has UTF8 BOM: $\($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\)"; $hasHighBytes = $false; foreach\($b in $bytes\) { if\($b -gt 127\) { $hasHighBytes = $true; break } }; Write-Output "Has non-ASCII bytes: $hasHighBytes")

PowerShell($path = "C:\\workspace\\chanho\\ClaudeSubAgent\\projects\\starter-project\\README.md"; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\(949\)\); $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $content, $utf8NoBom\); Write-Output "Saved as UTF-8 \(no BOM\)")

PowerShell($path = "C:\\workspace\\chanho\\ClaudeSubAgent\\projects\\starter-project\\web\\src\\App.jsx"; $cp949 = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\(949\); $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path, $cp949\); Write-Output "--- BEFORE \(decoded as CP949\) ---"; Write-Output $content)

PowerShell($path = "C:\\workspace\\chanho\\ClaudeSubAgent\\projects\\starter-project\\web\\src\\App.jsx"; $cp949 = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\(949\); $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path, $cp949\); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $content, $utf8NoBom\); Write-Output "Saved as UTF-8 \(no BOM\)")
